suspected_failure: Class capacity overrun: 2+ members book the last spot simultaneously and both succeed
explicit_assertion: Spawn 5 Promise.all calls to book against capacity=1 instance; expect prisma.attendanceRecord.count({where:{classInstanceId}}) === 1 AND 4 responses are 409

suspected_failure: Cross-tenant member fetch via direct ID returns wrong tenant's data
explicit_assertion: GET /api/dashboard/members/{memberB.id} as user from tenantA returns 404 AND no member row leaked in body

suspected_failure: Cross-tenant member edit via PATCH succeeds and mutates other tenant's row
explicit_assertion: PATCH /api/dashboard/members/{memberB.id} as tenantA owner with mutating body returns 404 AND prisma.member.findUnique({id:memberB.id}) is byte-identical to before

suspected_failure: Owner of tenantA elevates a user in tenantB to owner role
explicit_assertion: POST {userId:userBId, role:'owner', tenantId:tenantBId} as tenantA owner returns 403 AND prisma.user.findUnique({id:userBId}).role unchanged

suspected_failure: Kiosk token escalates to admin endpoints
explicit_assertion: Every /api/admin/* hit with Cookie: kiosk-token=... returns 401 (not 200, not 403 due to misclassification)

suspected_failure: Tenant-scoped admin impersonates a user in a different tenant
explicit_assertion: POST {userId:userBId} from tenantA admin (non-platform-admin) returns 403

suspected_failure: Webhook with metadata.tenantId pointing at tenantB but event.account of tenantA creates rows under tenantB
evidence_hint: defensive-eng §1.1; existing mitigation at line 258 — regression guard
explicit_assertion: Craft checkout.session.completed with metadata pointing at tenantB but event.account of tenantA; expect prisma.memberClassPack.count({where:{tenantId:tenantBId}}) === 0

suspected_failure: Duplicate belt promotion entry has no undo path (corrupts digital belt book)
explicit_assertion: POST same MemberRank.create twice (same memberId, rankId, promotedAt-day bucket); expect prisma.memberRank.count({where:{memberId,rankId}}) === 1 via dedupe constraint

suspected_failure: Magic-link token replayed after consumption still authenticates
explicit_assertion: Consume a magic link once successfully, replay same token; expect res.status === 401

suspected_failure: Hardcoded secret committed to source
explicit_assertion: Agent runs gitleaks scan over diff; expect zero matches OR pre-commit hook configured + verified to block secrets

suspected_failure: Inverted auth: 200 to anonymous, 401 to logged-in user
explicit_assertion: Hit every /api/dashboard/* unauthenticated; expect res.status === 401 for all (not 200)

suspected_failure: Family permission inheritance leak: 18-year-old dependent's User account gains parent's permissions
explicit_assertion: As 18yo dependent User, GET /api/billing returns 403 (no parent-rights inheritance)

suspected_failure: Member self-elevates to coach via PATCH /api/member/me {role:'coach'}
explicit_assertion: PATCH {role:'coach'} as member; expect role field stripped from payload OR res.status === 403; prisma.member role unchanged

suspected_failure: JWT/session cookie from tenantA accepted on tenantB subdomain
explicit_assertion: Mint session cookie for user in tenantA, present to request with Host header for tenantB; expect res.status === 401

suspected_failure: Tenant.stripeAccountStatus.charges_enabled=false but checkout endpoints silently succeed instead of 402
explicit_assertion: Set tenant.stripeAccountStatus.charges_enabled=false; POST class-pack buy; expect res.status === 402 with explicit error code

suspected_failure: Cross-tenant family link: Member.billingAccountId references an Account in a different tenant
explicit_assertion: Attempt to link member in tenantA to billingAccount in tenantB; expect rejected at API OR DB FK constraint enforces same-tenant

suspected_failure: Hidden-route auth-bypass on destructive operator endpoints (suspend/soft-delete/transfer-ownership/totp-reset/force-password-reset)
evidence_hint: Lane 1 inventory — 5 destructive ops, currently zero integration tests
explicit_assertion: For each of 5 destructive routes: hit without operator session; expect res.status === 401. Hit with non-operator session; expect res.status === 403

suspected_failure: Kiosk token has insufficient entropy (guessable / brute-forceable in <1M attempts)
evidence_hint: Lane 1 critical unknown — kiosk threat surface
explicit_assertion: Agent inspects lib/kiosk-token.ts; expects ≥128 bits of entropy from crypto.randomBytes; flags any deterministic generation

suspected_failure: Kiosk token of tenantA enumerates tenantB members
explicit_assertion: Use tenantA kiosk token to GET members; expect zero rows from tenantB AND every returned row has tenantId === tenantA.id

suspected_failure: Kiosk token rotation does not invalidate prior token
explicit_assertion: Generate token T1, rotate, attempt request with T1; expect res.status === 401

suspected_failure: Kiosk token replayed after rotation still grants access for grace window
explicit_assertion: Rotate token at t=0; attempt old token at t+1s, t+60s, t+5min; all expect res.status === 401 (no grace window)

suspected_failure: Kiosk endpoint accepts non-constant-time token comparison (timing oracle)
explicit_assertion: Agent inspects token verification path; expect timingSafeEqual or crypto.subtle.timingSafeEqual; flag any === or strcmp

suspected_failure: Manager assigns owner role to anyone (privilege escalation)
explicit_assertion: PATCH {role:'owner'} from manager session; expect res.status === 403

suspected_failure: Coach hits billing endpoints (/api/payments/*)
explicit_assertion: GET /api/payments AND POST /api/payments/[id]/refund as coach session; both expect res.status === 403

suspected_failure: Impersonation cookie persists after admin logout
explicit_assertion: Admin impersonates user, then logs out; navigate to /dashboard; expect redirect to /login AND no impersonation cookie remains in browser

suspected_failure: Webhook event ID replay creates duplicate Payment row (regression guard)
explicit_assertion: POST same Stripe event twice; second response indicates already processed AND prisma.payment.count({where:{stripeInvoiceId}}) === 1

suspected_failure: Refund issued in Stripe but MemberClassPack credits not reversed
explicit_assertion: Fire charge.refunded for a pack purchase; expect pack.creditsRemaining === 0 AND pack.status === 'refunded'

suspected_failure: Subscription cancelled mid-cycle but future bookings remain valid
explicit_assertion: Cancel subscription; expect prisma.attendanceRecord.findMany({where:{memberId, classInstance:{startsAt:{gt:now}}}}) === [] OR booking endpoint returns 402 for cancelled members

suspected_failure: Refund recorded but Payment.status still 'succeeded'
explicit_assertion: After charge.refunded webhook: expect payment.status === 'refunded' AND payment.refundedAmountPence > 0

suspected_failure: Cancelled member with active future bookings
explicit_assertion: Set member.paymentStatus='cancelled'; assert no AttendanceRecord exists with classInstance.startsAt > now

suspected_failure: Duplicate charge from double-clicked checkout
explicit_assertion: Two parallel POST with same Idempotency-Key header; expect prisma.checkoutSession.count === 1 AND only one Stripe charge

suspected_failure: Waitlist promotion not fired on cancellation (waitlisted member misses spot)
explicit_assertion: Member books capacity=1; second waitlists; first cancels; expect emailLog includes {templateId:'waitlist_promoted'} AND second member has attendanceRecord

suspected_failure: Concurrent waitlist promotions promote the same waitlisted member twice
evidence_hint: common-errors §2 + defensive-eng §3.2 (SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED)
explicit_assertion: Two parallel cancellation handlers fire; expect prisma.attendanceRecord.count({where:{memberId:waitlistMember.id, classInstanceId}}) === 1

suspected_failure: Time-zone bug: class scheduled '7pm UK' rendered/booked using server UTC
explicit_assertion: Create class at 2026-03-29T19:00:00Z (DST boundary); expect formatForGymTz(instance.startsAt, 'Europe/London') === '19:00 BST' (not '20:00')

suspected_failure: DST boundary skips or duplicates a recurring class instance
explicit_assertion: Generate recurring 'Mon 19:00' instances spanning DST change (last Sunday March); expect instances.length === N exact, no skip/dup; verify each instance.startsAt is correct UK local 19:00

suspected_failure: Offline kiosk sync replays produce duplicate attendance rows
explicit_assertion: POST same kiosk check-in payload with same Idempotency-Key from 'tablet'; expect prisma.attendanceRecord.count === 1

suspected_failure: Stripe count not reset to 0 on belt promotion
explicit_assertion: Promote member white→blue; expect new MemberRank.stripes === 0 immediately post-promotion (within same transaction)

suspected_failure: Belt downgrade loses intermediate promotion history
explicit_assertion: Mistakenly promote to purple, then 'undo'; expect prisma.memberRank.findMany({where:{memberId},orderBy:{promotedAt:'asc'}}) retains all rows; the bad one marked voided=true (not deleted)

suspected_failure: Concurrent coach edits to same MemberRank lose updates
explicit_assertion: Two prisma.memberRank.update with same version; expect second update affects 0 rows / throws conflict error (optimistic lock)

suspected_failure: DSAR erase orphans attendance records (member deleted but rows remain unanonymised)
explicit_assertion: POST DSAR erase; expect prisma.attendanceRecord.findMany({where:{memberId}}) === [] OR every row has memberId=null AND member PII columns are null

suspected_failure: Roster shows financial info to non-staff members
explicit_assertion: Login as member, navigate to roster page; expect page.locator('text=£').count() === 0 AND no payment-status indicators visible

suspected_failure: Hallucinated middleware: claimed protection on a route that has none
explicit_assertion: For every app/api/admin/* route, agent grep first 30 lines for require* call OR isAdminAuthed call; expect missingProtection list === []

suspected_failure: Float (number) used for monetary amounts instead of Int pence
explicit_assertion: grep -r 'Float' prisma/schema.prisma AND grep money-related fields for non-Int types; expect zero violations

suspected_failure: Family-account: kid sees parent's billing data
explicit_assertion: As kid User, GET /api/member/billing; expect res.status === 403

suspected_failure: Family-account: cancelling parent membership cancels kids' memberships too
explicit_assertion: Cancel parent membership; expect kids retained (prisma.member.findMany({where:{billingAccountId:parentAccount.id, isMinor:true}}) length unchanged) with billing transferred or flagged for review

suspected_failure: Authorisation cache not invalidated on role revoke (5-minute grace where user keeps access)
explicit_assertion: Revoke user role, immediately request /api/dashboard; expect res.status === 403 (no grace window)

suspected_failure: Out-of-order webhooks: older event overwrites newer state
explicit_assertion: Process subscription.updated(t=2) then subscription.updated(t=1); expect member.paymentStatus matches t=2 state, not t=1

suspected_failure: Soft vs hard decline misclassified — paymentStatus toggled on first soft retry
explicit_assertion: Two invoice.payment_failed events for same invoice with different last_finalization_error.code; expect member.paymentStatus changes to 'overdue' only after policy threshold, not first soft fail

suspected_failure: Pro-rate edge case on plan upgrade mid-cycle (over- or under-charge)
explicit_assertion: Upgrade £50→£80 on day 17/30; expect Stripe invoice line items contain prorated entry; total ≤ expected delta (no double-charge)

suspected_failure: BACS mandate change without 3-day notice triggers bank reversal
explicit_assertion: Trigger price change within 3 working days of next charge; expect Stripe call uses proration_behavior='none' OR notice-respect logic delays the change

suspected_failure: Double check-in on same class within 60s window
explicit_assertion: POST /api/checkin twice within 60s same (memberId, classInstanceId); expect prisma.attendanceRecord.count === 1 (uses @@unique constraint)

suspected_failure: Attendance backfill blocked after Sunday lockout (MAAT bug — coaches can't fix Friday's missing attendance)
explicit_assertion: As coach, POST attendance for class 5 days ago; expect res.status === 200 AND row created (no artificial lockout); separately, attempt 30-day-old backfill; expect 403 with reason='backfill_window_exceeded'

suspected_failure: Class type tagging drift affects belt promotion eligibility
explicit_assertion: Mis-tag fundamentals as advanced; query promotion eligibility; expect AuditLog row exists with {entityType:'Class', field:'type', before, after, userId}

suspected_failure: Promotion audit trail missing promotedByUserId
explicit_assertion: After promotion, expect memberRank.promotedByUserId === coach.id AND auditLog row exists for action='rank.promoted'

suspected_failure: Time-in-grade enforcement missing (IBJJF rule: min 2 years at blue belt before purple)
explicit_assertion: Try to promote blue<2years to purple; expect canPromote() returns {allowed:false, reason:'time_in_grade'}

suspected_failure: DSAR erase preserves anonymised aggregate counts
explicit_assertion: After DSAR erase, expect prisma.attendanceAggregate.count({where:{tenantId,date}}) > 0 (anonymised aggregate retained for tax/audit)

suspected_failure: Password reset link not invalidated by new request (replay window)
explicit_assertion: Request reset twice in succession; expect GET /reset?token=oldToken returns 401

suspected_failure: Service-worker stale cache: belt update not reflected in PWA after 5s
explicit_assertion: Update belt via API; hard-reload PWA; expect page.locator('[data-belt]').toHaveText('blue') within 5s (cache versioning honoured)

suspected_failure: skipWaiting causes mid-form data loss when SW updates
explicit_assertion: Open form, simulate SW update mid-typing; expect formValues retained post-reload OR explicit 'updates available, save first' UX

suspected_failure: Read-modify-write lost update on Tenant settings (two parallel PATCHes)
explicit_assertion: Two parallel PATCH /api/settings; expect final settings === one of the writers fully (not partial merge); OR optimistic-lock conflict returns 409

suspected_failure: Stack trace leaked in 500 response body
explicit_assertion: Force a thrown error in handler; expect res.body does not contain 'at Object.' AND does not contain process.cwd()

suspected_failure: Outbox pattern missing: state change without dispatched event
explicit_assertion: After belt promotion, expect prisma.outboxEvent.findFirst({where:{aggregateId:rankId, eventType:'rank.promoted'}}) is truthy

suspected_failure: Reconciliation drift: Stripe says plan A, DB says plan B
explicit_assertion: Run nightly reconciler against mocked Stripe; expect driftReport === [] for active tenants

suspected_failure: CSV import partial-commit on row error
explicit_assertion: Import 100-row CSV with row 50 invalid; expect prisma.member.count() === 0 (savepoint rollback) AND ImportJob.status === 'failed' with rowError detail

suspected_failure: Webhook handler exceeds 10s timeout (slow downstream)
explicit_assertion: Mock slow downstream; expect handler returns 200 within 10s (defers heavy work to outbox or queue)

suspected_failure: Email sent twice for same dedupe key (rank promoted, payment failed, etc.)
explicit_assertion: Trigger same rank.promoted event twice; expect prisma.emailDispatchLog.count({where:{dedupeKey}}) === 1 AND sendEmail called once

suspected_failure: Late check-in after class ended has no policy (silently accepted or hard-failed)
explicit_assertion: Check-in 30min after endsAt; expect res.status === 409 with explicit reason='class_ended' per defined window policy

suspected_failure: Email verification loop: old link revoked silently after resend
explicit_assertion: After resend, click old link; expect res.status === 401 with helpful copy 'A newer verification link was sent — please check your inbox'

suspected_failure: Owner can't edit bills (Gymex bug — admin must contact support)
explicit_assertion: As owner, PATCH /api/payments/{id} adjust amount; expect res.status === 200 AND payment.amountPence updated

suspected_failure: RB-001 mock-drift failure (test name TBD via vitest run)
explicit_assertion: Run vitest on the failing file; expect exit code 0. First step: run `npm test 2>&1 | grep -E '(FAIL|✗)' | head -20` to enumerate exact failing test names; populate this catalogue item with the real route_or_module before fixing.
